name: Rhubarb Pie with Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees. Mix flour and brown sugar together. Line a 9 inch pie plate with pastry. Sprinkle one third of the flour, sugar mixture over the crust. Arrange a layer of rhubarb and scatter lemon slices over it. Sprinkle with the sugar mixture. Repeat once or twice until all ingredients are used. Cover with a lattice crust (preferable, as this is a juicy pie) and bake for 50-60 minutes.
